'''Aquella''' was a [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] located in the [[Senex sector/Legends|Senex sector]]. By [[3643 BBY]], an [[Unidentified aristocrat|aristocrat]] residing on Aquella offered valuable items as dowry to anyone who would [[Marriage/Legends|marry]] [[Gender/Legends|his]] cousin. Aquella was [[Colonist/Legends|colonized]] by [[Human/Legends|Human]] settlers at one point; however, the colony was lost by the [[Time/Legends|time]] the [[Senex-Juvex/Legends|Senex-Juvex]] region came under the rule of the [[Noble/Legends|aristocratic]] [[Ancient Houses]]. The [[Aquellan]]s, the descendants of the original colonists, were a culture notable for their rituals involving the [[Color|dyeing]] and [[Tattoo/Legends|tattooing]] of young males' bodies.

==Description==
Aquella was a murky<ref name="TEA" /> terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|world]]<ref name="JAS">''[[The Jedi Academy Sourcebook]]''</ref> located in the [[Aquella system/Legends|Aquella system]] of the [[Senex sector/Legends|Senex sector]], a part of the [[Senex-Juvex/Legends|Senex-Juvex]] region in the [[Western Reaches/Legends|Western Reaches]] portion of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. A [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] linked it to the [[Rulaar system/Legends|Rulaar system]].<ref name="TEA" />

==History==
{{Gamemechanics|Star Wars: The Old Republic}}
At some point around [[3643 BBY]],<ref name="date">Per the reasoning [[Template:TOR_dates|here]], Act I of ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' takes place around [[3643 BBY]]. Since players of ''The Old Republic'' can assign their companions on the mission "I Do" independently of the main class storyline at any point during the game, the mission must take place at some point around 3643 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]].</ref> an [[Unidentified aristocrat|aristocrat]] on Aquella offered a dowry consisting of rare, valuable items to anyone who would [[Marriage/Legends|marry]] [[Gender/Legends|his]] cousin. An individual affiliated with one of the sides in the ongoing [[Sith Wars/Legends|struggle]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|reconstituted Sith Empire]] sent one of their companions on a mission to [[Thief/Legends|steal]] the dowry at the wedding party. As soon as the valuables were presented at the wedding, the companion seized them, with the marriage proceeding anyway.<ref name="SWTOR">{{TORcite|type=crewskill|Treasure Hunting|I Do}}</ref>
{{Endgame}}

During the final days of the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]], it was represented by the [[Nautolan/Legends|Nautolan]] [[King/Legends|King]] [[Lorro]]. Lorro was held hostage by the Imperial [[General/Legends|General]] [[Arkos Rakton]] to force him to side with the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Sith Empire]], but a Nautolan diplomat named [[Helik (Nautolan)|Helik]] secretly helped the [[Meteor (Havoc Squad)|Commander of Havoc Squad]] to [[Outpost 256]] where Lorro and other heads-of-state were kept, so the commander could save them from their imperial captors.<ref name="date" />

Aquella was [[Colonist/Legends|colonized]] by [[Human/Legends|Human]] settlers at some point; however, over [[Time/Legends|time]] the colony came to be considered lost. When the [[Noble/Legends|aristocratic]] [[Ancient Houses]] established themselves as the rulers of the Senex-Juvex region at some point following the [[Ruusan campaign|Battle of Ruusan]] of [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]], Aquella fell under the control of the new [[Lord/Legends|lords]] of the Senex [[Sector/Legends|sector]].<ref name="TEA" /> [[Wermyn]], a [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] of Aquella, was among<ref name="JAS" /> the descendants of the original colony of Aquella.<ref name="TEA" /> He underwent a traditional rite of passage ceremony on his homeworld at a young age<ref name="JAS" /> at some point by [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]].<ref name="Date11ABY">''[[The Jedi Academy Sourcebook]]'' is set during the events of ''[[Star Wars: The Jedi Academy Trilogy]]'', which ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates to [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]].</ref>

==Inhabitants==
[[File:Wermyn.jpg|thumb|left|350px|Wermyn, an Aquellan man native to Aquella]]
An elderly aristocrat resided on Aquella by 3643 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]].<ref name="SWTOR" /> At some point, a Human colony was established on Aquella that eventually disappeared. The descendants of the colony, known as the [[Aquellan]]s, were notable for their [[Aquellan language|language]], which was guttural and was believed to be related to an ancient language used by the inhabitants of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] planet [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]]. Another unique element of the Aquellan culture was their<ref name="TEA" /> rite of passage ceremony,<ref name="JAS" /> which entailed the ritual [[Color|dyeing]] and [[Tattoo/Legends|tattooing]] of a young male's body,<ref name="TEA" /> sometimes to the point that the Aquellan man in question bore a closer visual resemblance to a [[Near-Human]] than a baseline Human.<ref name="JAS" />

==Behind the scenes==
Aquella was first mentioned in ''[[The Jedi Academy Sourcebook]]'', a [[1996]] sourcebook authored by [[Paul Sudlow]] for use with [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="JAS" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed it in grid square L-17.<ref name="TEA" />
